About Natthanarong Tiangjit (Nine)

Natthanarong Tiangjit, professionally known as Nine, is a Thai AI Software Developer and Robotics Engineer based in Bangkok, Thailand. He is currently a third-year AI Engineering student at Bangkok University, where he received a 100% Tech Talent Scholarship for exceptional academic performance.

Professional Background

Nine serves as the Head of Operations at BU ROBOTSTUDIO, a robotics laboratory at Bangkok University. In this role, he leads a team of 50+ members, organizes workshops and Open House events, and conducts R&D in AI and robotics. His progression includes Staff (2023), Operation Lead (2024), and Head of Operations (2025).

Notable Achievements

  • Outstanding Innovation Award Winner - Super AI Engineer Season 5 (2025), Thailand's 5th National AI Exhibition. Built a RAG Chatbot and worked as CAIO for RaoChatHub startup.
  • Tech Talent 100% Scholarship - Full scholarship recipient at Bangkok University for the AI Engineering and Data Science program.
  • Finalist PLC Competition Thailand 2024 - Mitsubishi competition finalist, built AI-powered smart parking system with PLC and computer vision.
  • Finalist Gaskathon PTT 2024 - Gas innovation hackathon finalist.
  • 2x LearnLab Innovation Finalist - Built AI/AR Marketplace for handicrafts and PhotoBooth for tourism.

Technical Skills and Expertise

Programming Languages

Python (primary), JavaScript, TypeScript

AI and Machine Learning

Large Language Model (LLM) Optimization, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Computer Vision, Object Detection, Deep Learning, Model Deployment

Web Development

Full-Stack Development, Next.js, React, Django, Node.js, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, REST APIs, Responsive Design

Robotics and Automation

Robot Programming, PLC Programming (Mitsubishi), Ladder Logic, Industrial Automation, ABB Robotics, Embedded Systems, Computer Vision for Robotics

Tools and Technologies

Docker, Git, GitHub, MATLAB, Linux, Cloud Deployment, Database Management

Projects Portfolio

Super AI Engineer Season 5 - RAG Chatbot

Built an enterprise RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) chatbot solution as part of Thailand's 5th National AI Exhibition. The project won the Outstanding Innovation Award. Technologies used include Python, LLM, RAG architecture, and enterprise deployment.

HyperGas AI Safety Training System

Developed an AI-powered safety training system for gas stations to reduce human error in safety protocols. The system was deployed live and used AI for training scenarios.

AI Smart Parking System

Built an AI-powered smart parking system combining PLC programming and computer vision for the Mitsubishi PLC Competition Thailand 2024. Reached national finals among 16 teams.

functions.codes - Free Online Tools

Created a platform offering free online tools without advertisements, including a PDF converter with a clean, user-friendly interface. Built with modern web technologies.

Gender Classification AI

Self-initiated project building gender classification from text using NLP and web scraping. End-to-end deployment with Django backend and JavaScript frontend.

Education

Bangkok University - Bachelor's degree in AI Engineering and Data Science (2024-Present). Full Tech Talent Scholarship recipient. Active in competitions, innovation projects, and robotics laboratory.

Data Science NanoDegree - Completed 4-month program in 2 months, covering Machine Learning, Statistics, and Python programming.

International Experience

Participated in the Learning Express Program with Singapore Polytechnic for 3 consecutive years (2024-2026). Applied Design Thinking methodologies to solve real community problems with international teams, developing cross-cultural communication skills.

Languages

  • Thai - Native
  • English - B2 Level (Speexx Test Certified)

Availability

Currently open to opportunities including full-time positions, internships, and freelance work in AI development, web development, and robotics. Available for remote work and located in Bangkok, Thailand.

Contact Information

  • Email: natthanarong.tian@gmail.com
  • Phone: +66 91 785 3400
  • Location: Bangkok, Thailand
  • GitHub: github.com/nine-codes
  • LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/natthanarong

My Story

More Than Just Code

Bangkok, Thailand

Natthanarong

Also known as “Nine”

I'm a third-year engineering student at Bangkok University on a full scholarship. I enjoy working at the intersection of creativity and technology.

From leading robotics teams to winning AI competitions, I work across hardware and software. Each project teaches me something new and helps me grow as an engineer.

∞

Curiosity

15+

Projects

7

Robots Built

Passionate Creator

I care about building things that matter. Every project gets my full attention and effort.

Design Thinker

I balance technical skills with design thinking. Good software should work well and look good.

Lifelong Explorer

I enjoy learning new things. Robotics, hackathons, and competitions keep me growing.

Community Builder

I led teams at BU ROBOTSTUDIO, mentored peers, and helped out at tech events.

“Building useful technology,
one project at a time.”
